_comment: Merge into LLaMA-Factory/data/dataset_info.json and put the .jsonl under data/. Requires the fork branch feat/per-turn-loss-mask (per-turn `loss` + per-example `enable_thinking`). Train BOTH datasets in ONE run: `dataset: innovation_sft,innovation_maintain`, template qwen3 (or qwen3_5), mask_history=false. The per-turn `loss` flags do the folding; the per-example `enable_thinking:false` rows (no-reasoning distillation) put their empty think in the prompt, not the loss — so a single qwen3 (thinking) run safely mixes reasoning and non-reasoning data.
